caption: MACRS Depreciation Rates
description: A table showing the recovery rates for 3-year, 5-year, and 7-year asset classes over their respective recovery periods.

caption: SL Method Depreciation Schedule
description: A table calculating depreciation expense and accumulated depreciation for a $100,000 asset using the Straight-Line method with a half-year convention.

caption: MACRS Method Depreciation Schedule
description: A table calculating depreciation expense and accumulated depreciation for a $100,000 asset using the MACRS method.
